---
title: "Gut micro-organisms associated with health, nutrition and dietary interventions"
author: 
- Asnicar
- Manghi
- Fackelmann
- et al.
publication: "Nature, **650**, 450–458 (2026)"
categories: 
  - external-publication
  - microbiome
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1038/s41586-025-09854-7
url_preprint: 
journ: "Nature"
issue: 650
page: 450–458
year: 2026
image: ""
pub_number: 
doi: 10.1038/s41586-025-09854-7
---
